question: Will Andy Burnham win a majority of the vote in the Makerfield byelection?
reason: Recent polls show Burnham leading, but Reform UK's regional momentum poses a significant challenge.
evidence: A Survation poll from May 22, 2026, indicates Burnham at 43% and Reform UK's Robert Kenyon at 40% in Makerfield. ([electionpolling.co.uk](https://www.electionpolling.co.uk/by-elections/2026/06/18/makerfield?utm_source=openai))

Reform UK secured 50% of the vote in eight Makerfield wards during the May 2026 local elections, while Labour obtained 23%. ([itv.com](https://www.itv.com/news/granada/2026-05-20/date-of-makerfield-by-election-confirmed?utm_source=openai))

Burnham's campaign emphasizes a desire to 'change Labour,' appealing to voters seeking reform. ([itv.com](https://www.itv.com/news/2026-05-22/burnham-says-backing-him-in-by-election-would-be-vote-to-change-labour?utm_source=openai))
searchQueries: Andy Burnham Makerfield 2026 by-election latest results
